label: "Confidence Calibration"
icon: "📊"
---

## Confidence Calibration

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<Quiz question="Why is self-assessed confidence (asking the model 'how confident are you?') unreliable on its own?" options={["Models can't understand confidence","Models tend to be overconfident -- they rarely express uncertainty proportional to their actual knowledge","Self-assessment is too slow","It only works with GPT-4"]} correctIndex={1} explanation="LLMs are systematically overconfident. They're trained on human feedback that rewards confident answers. Multi-signal confidence (self-assessment + consistency + entropy) is much more reliable." />
